author: Anthony
name: Diffusion Noised Teacher Forcing (Smoke)
blurb: Non-record smoke run: keep standard AR val_bpb, but blend clean teacher forcing with a diffusion-inspired noisy-context auxiliary loss on fixed SP-1024 shards. A 4-step 1xGPU run validates the idea end to end and roundtrips to 4.0949 BPB well under the 16MB cap.
